provenance.author: verify
provenance.notes: Ground-card variant of the original bamboo-grove clump (free_bamboo_set, 3 culms re-clustered, 0.34 uniform scale -> ~14.3m). Reuses the normalized 3-culm GLB, baked to a front-view alpha card for DENSE high-density concealment placement. The sparse bamboo-grove asset now uses a single-culm mesh + single-culm static impostor instead, so side views do not duplicate or collapse a multi-culm clump. Distinct id so dense thickets and sparse groves can be tuned independently. Credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+card-far
lod.rationale: Dense bamboo reads as vertical culms with alpha leaf fans up close (cheap instanced mesh, globally capped near-mesh tier), then flattens to a baked alpha card past ~35m so a high-density thicket costs one draw + one atlas instead of a GLB clone per clump.

bands.notes: Baked front-view alpha card (scripts/bake-veg-card.mjs); instanced two-sided cross + hard-culled at 85m.
